title: Real-site enablement: opt-in real tier, selector discovery, UC1-3 real acceptance (D-002)
status_explanation: Automated/tier-plumbing half (T1) DONE + manager-gate-verified (mock suite 132 passed/1 deselected, exit 0; real.json still all-empty fail-closed; double-gate + allowlist + preflight + executable_path landed in commit 3693388). Real-site half BLOCKED at T2 logged-out preflight: headed Chromium 149 launched cleanly via /usr/bin/chromium (NO display issue, NO playwright/chromium protocol mismatch — both prior risks RESOLVED), profile UNLOCKED, but chatgpt.com showed a login/auth wall. Worker correctly refused to automate login and stopped. 0 real messages spent; 30-message budget fully intact. T2b/T3/T4 all depend on a signed-in session, so all blocked. EXACT operator action required: sign into chatgpt.com in the Chromium profile used for the run (~/.config/chromium, Default), then resume M-006 from T2.

manager_lifetimes.note: Canonical sibling primary, watched by team-lead watcher PID 3311983 (bounded auto-recovery). A DUPLICATE manager (PID 3286529, session 095811) double-launched at 09:58, self-detected, and STOOD DOWN at ~10:09 with ZERO harm (0 workers, 0 messages, real.json untouched, no commits). Its informational note orchestration/state/M-006-DUPLICATE-STANDDOWN-3286529.json is benign and left in place (not mission state; not mine to delete). Verified 10:19: duplicate PID dead, its session gone, audit ledger 0 lines, I am sole-live. Apparatus bug surfaced to lead/operator in that note (recommend per-mission singleton spawn guard).

objective: Plumb an opt-in, bounded, audited real-site test tier (D-002); empirically discover real chatgpt.com selectors/affordances and fill real.json; run UC1-3 real-site acceptance; independently verify (best-of-N) and update VERIFICATION.md real-site scope with a final VERDICT.

real_message_budget.note: Budget spans ALL manager lifetimes. Every real message logged. Exhausted -> finish verifiable, handoff PARTIAL, NEVER exceed.

constraints.real_site: Permitted ONLY in T2/T3 within budget. Headed only, human-paced, ONE real worker at a time (serialize). Login NEVER automated; logged-out/profile-locked -> named actionable error, STOP leg. Never read/store/log credentials/cookies/tokens/profile contents. No account identifiers in any artifact/report/commit/code.
constraints.default_tier: Stays loopback-mock-only; autouse socket guard must never be weakened; clean `uv run pytest` collects ZERO real_site tests.
constraints.write_scope: Only inside /home/abhmul/dev/ask-chatgpt (+ tmp/). Archive READ-ONLY. Never write .claude/ or .agents/. Never touch shared agent venv. uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS. Serialize pytest. NEVER git push.
constraints.real_legs_serialize: Real-site legs never overlap. pi launches serialize on this harness anyway (budget N-panel as ~sum).

environment_preflight.display: DISPLAY=:0, XAUTHORITY=/home/abhmul/.Xauthority present, XDG_SESSION_TYPE=tty. Display MAY be reachable by a spawned worker but UNPROVEN until a worker actually attempts a headed launch (mission's named-BLOCKED risk).
environment_preflight.profile_lock_state: UNLOCKED right now (no chromium process, no SingletonLock at ~/.config/chromium). Real legs feasible from lock standpoint AT THIS TIME; window closes if operator reopens Chromium.
environment_preflight.likely_profile_path: /home/abhmul/.config/chromium (Arch default; opaque config, contents NEVER read)
environment_preflight.logged_in_state: UNKNOWN -- only resolvable by a real worker opening the profile (counts against message budget).

ground_truth_facts.driver_d2_failclosed_present: driver.py:101-102 start() calls _ensure_real_selector_map_ready() for channel=real BEFORE sync_playwright().start() -- MUST preserve.
ground_truth_facts.real_start_path: driver.py:301-312 _start_real_context() launch_persistent_context(user_data_dir, headless=False, accept_downloads=True); NO executable_path; catch-all swallows lock error into generic AskChatGPTError.
ground_truth_facts.mock_route_guard_exists: driver.py:283-293 _install_mock_route_guard (loopback-only abort). No real-tier allowlist yet.
ground_truth_facts.errors_present: LoginRequiredError exists (errors.py:18). No profile-lock error class. SelectorUnavailableError exists.
ground_truth_facts.real_json: src/ask_chatgpt/selector_maps/real.json all-empty fail-closed template (20 selectors + 2 attributes).
ground_truth_facts.suite_baseline: 121 passed at HEAD per M-005 handoff (clean clone).

artifacts.desc: T1 tier plumbing: real_site marker + addopts deselection (pyproject), ASK_CHATGPT_REAL double-gate + guard tests (conftest), real_allowlist.py domain allowlist, ProfileLockedError + lock preflight, logged-out URL heuristic, executable_path knob (driver)
authoritative T1 suite run 132 passed/1 deselected/exit 0 (git-ignored)

blockers.condition: The Chromium Default profile (~/.config/chromium) is logged out of chatgpt.com (login/auth wall). Login is NEVER automated (D-002), so the agent cannot resolve this.
blockers.exact_operator_action: Sign into chatgpt.com in the Chromium profile at ~/.config/chromium (Default profile), keeping that profile signed in. Then close Chromium (so the profile is UNLOCKED for the headed worker) and resume MISSION-006 — the resume manager re-dispatches T2 from preflight. If your signed-in ChatGPT session lives in a DIFFERENT Chromium profile-directory, say which one so T2 can target it via --profile-directory (the agent will not inspect your profiles).
blockers.not_blocked_on: display reachability (DISPLAY=:0 worked), profile lock (was unlocked), or playwright/chromium version (149 drove cleanly) — these are RESOLVED. Only sign-in remains.
blockers.budget_impact: none — 0 of 30 real messages spent; full budget available on resume.

resume_instructions: Re-verify recorded state vs ground truth INCLUDING messages spent (count lines in the audit ledger tmp/real-audit-20260612T100518/messages.log; budget spans all manager lifetimes). For each task with status DONE, confirm the named report exists with its STATUS line before skipping it. Continue from the first non-DONE task respecting deps. Real legs serialize and require the profile UNLOCKED (no Chromium running) + a reachable display + logged-in profile; if any precondition fails at T2/T3, complete what is verifiable and handoff PARTIAL with the EXACT operator action. NEVER exceed 30 real messages. NEVER git push. Headless claude -p: foreground watches only (--wait-seconds 480, loop), never background; write handoff before ending turn.
next_action: MISSION PAUSED — PARTIAL/BLOCKED on operator sign-in (blocker B1). This headless manager is closing out: handoff written, slice committed. RESUME PATH (after operator signs into chatgpt.com Default profile and closes Chromium): a fresh manager reads this state, recomputes spent messages from the ledger (still 0), re-dispatches T2 (orchestration/tasks/M-006/T2-discovery.md) from preflight; on usable selectors -> T2b (author orchestration/tasks/M-006/T2b-install.md: install proposed map into src/real.json + DECOUPLE test_driver.py:150 fail-closed test to an empty-map fixture + extend real_allowlist asset domains + full-suite green + commit) -> T3 (author orchestration/tasks/M-006/T3-acceptance.md, real UC1-3, <=15 msgs) -> T4a-d best-of-N verification panel -> VERIFICATION.md real-site section + verify.md VERDICT -> closeout commit. T2b and T3 contracts are NOT yet authored (author at resume). Real-launch recipe PROVEN: executable_path=/usr/bin/chromium, user_data_dir=~/.config/chromium, --profile-directory=Default, headed, DISPLAY=:0 — all worked; only login was missing.
